title: RuntimeGameState
description: Published snapshot while a session is active (not idle). Same body on POST /api/game-state, GET /api/game-state, and GAME_STATE_WEBHOOK_URL.

timestamp.description: Milliseconds since epoch when the controller produced this snapshot. Use to detect stale updates and order events.

state.description: Current position and timing in the active session.

phase.description: Current session phase. work = exercise interval; rest = between rounds or stations; passBreak = pause between full circuit passes (manual resume); complete = session finished.

currentStation.description: 1-based station index within the current pass (1 … config.stations).

currentRound.description: 1-based round index at the current station (1 … config.roundsPerStation).

currentPass.description: 1-based pass through the full circuit of all stations × rounds (1 … config.fullSessionPasses).

timeRemaining.description: Seconds left in the current timed phase (work or rest). 0 during passBreak and complete.

isRunning.description: True while the session clock is actively ticking (false when paused or waiting for manual resume on passBreak).

isPaused.description: True when the operator has paused the session timer.

completedIntervals.description: Count of finished work + rest intervals in this session so far.

totalIntervals.description: Total work + rest intervals for the full session. Progress = completedIntervals / totalIntervals.

startedAtMs.description: Wall-clock ms when the session left idle and started. Present once the game is underway.

endedAtMs.description: Wall-clock ms when the session reached complete. Present only after the game has ended.

config.description: Session rules in effect for this run. Always present while the game is active.

workTime.description: Length of each work interval in seconds (default 45).

restTime.description: Rest duration between rounds at the same station, in seconds (default 15).

restBetweenStationsTime.description: Rest duration after the last round at a station, before moving to the next station, in seconds (default 30).

roundsPerStation.description: Number of work rounds at each station before advancing (default 3).

stations.description: Number of stations in one circuit pass (default 6).

fullSessionPasses.description: How many full passes through all stations × rounds constitute the session (default 2).

maxTrackPlaySeconds.description: Maximum seconds a Spotify track may play before the controller skips to the next track.

workVolume.description: Spotify playback volume during work phases, 0–100.

restVolume.description: Spotify playback volume during rest phases, 0–100.

spotifyPlaylistUri.description: Spotify playlist URI or URL backing the session soundtrack. Omitted if no playlist was set.

spotifyEnabled.description: When false, no playlist plays even if connected and a URL is set. Session timers still run.
